titleStmt.title: SII 9.142: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 142. (A.R. No. 523 of 1915.) ON A STONE LYING NEAR THE SLUICE OF KARIM SAHIB TANK AT CHINNATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated [ChƒÅlukya-Vi]krama year 4, SiddhƒÅrthi, Jyƒìsh·π≠ha, ≈õu. 10, B·πõihaspativƒÅra. In SiddhƒÅrthin, Jyƒìsh·π≠ha, ≈õu. 10 corresponded to A.D. 1079 May 13 Monday, not Thursday as stated; but in KƒÅ·∏∑ayukti, the tithi did fall on Thursday = 24th May A.D. 1078. It refers itself to the reign of the ChƒÅ·∏∑ukya king Tribhuvanamalladƒìva and records that the MahƒÅma·πá·∏çalƒì≈õvara J≈çyimayyarasa made a gift to Srƒ´dhara-Bha·π≠·π≠a when the former was ruling over SindavƒÅ·∏çi thousand. The record is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanƒÅ≈õraya ≈õrƒ´prithvƒ´vallabha mahƒÅrƒÅjƒÅdhirƒÅja paramƒì
≈õvara·πÅ paramabha·π≠·π≠ƒÅraka·πÅ satyƒÅ≈õrayaku·∏∑ati·∏∑aka·πÅ cƒÅ·∏∑ukyƒÅbhara·πáa·πÅ ≈õrƒ´mattri

ra ≈õrƒ´matu ma·πÅ·∏ça·∏∑ikamadanamahƒì≈õvara nijaku·∏∑akuva·∏∑ayasudhƒÅkara·πÅ vinayaratnƒÅkara·πÅ se·πáasuma·πá·∏ça

va ma·πüevugekƒÅva·πÅ vi·π£amaturagƒÅr≈´·∏çhaprau·∏çharƒìkhƒÅrƒìvantanahitak·πõtƒÅnta·πÅ ≈õrƒ´mallikƒÅrjju

t·πõbh≈çgƒÅbhya·πÅtarasuddhiyinƒÅ·∏∑du sukhadinarasugeyyuttamire
